transformation_chain.name: Exp_NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS
transformation_chain.description: This is the expression transformation for generating the Batch_Id key

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.HOLD_DETAIL_ID,
NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.SO_HEADER_ID, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.SO_LINE_ID, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.REASON_CODE, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.SO_ACCOUNTING_RULE, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.IS_SPLIT, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.EITF_PCT, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.SOP_PCT, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ELEMENT_TYPE, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ACTION, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.SO_LINE_AMT, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ELEMENT_AMT, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.RC_RANK, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.PRIORITY, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.DATASET_NUMBER, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ELEMENT_PCT_ON_SOLINE, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ELEMENT_PCT_FUNDED, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ELEMENT_PCT_FUNDED_P, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ELEMENT_PCT_AVAILABLE, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.UNFUNDED, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ELEMENT_RELEASE_PCT, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ELEMENT_RELEASE_AMT, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.USAGE_PCT, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.RECLASS_PCT, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.TOTAL_SEQ_DEFER_PCT, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.TOTAL_SEQ_PROV_PCT, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.TOTAL_ELEMENT_PCT_FUNDED, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.RAE_PCT, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.RAE_PROCESS_FLAG, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.RAE_POSTED, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.RAE_ADJUSTMENT_ID, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.CATEOGORY_ID, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.INHERITED_FLAG,
 NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ORG_ID, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.STATUS_CODE, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.FISCAL_PERIOD, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.START_PERIOD, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.INVOICE_HOLD, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.GLOBAL_HIERARCHY, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.APPLY_FUTURE_TRXS, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.DEFER_IMMD, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.TOTAL_SEQ_PROV_AMT, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.TOTAL_SEQ_DEFER_AMT, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.INHERITED_FRM_HDR_ID, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.INHERITED_FRM_LN_ID, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.PROFILE_ID,  NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.TEMPLATE_ID, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.TEMPLATE_NAME, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.REASON_CODE_ID, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.STARTING_POINT, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.SRC_ID, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.GLOBAL_NAME, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.HOLD_INTERFACE_ID, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE_CAT, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE1, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE2, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE3, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE4, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE5, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE6, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE7, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE8, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE9, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE10, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE11, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE12, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE13, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE14, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.ATTRIBUTE15, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.LAST_UPDATED_BY, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.CREATED_BY, NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS.CREATION_DATE 
FROM
NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS_MV NGCCRM_HOLDS_DETAILS
 WHERE LAST_UPDATE_DATE  >TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
